USER.ping: !ping - Test bot connectivity with network-specific response.
USER.stats: !stats - Display uptime, feed counts, and subscription counts.
USER.admin: !admin - Show admin info for current channel (non-admins get partial info).
USER.listfeeds: !listfeeds [#channel] - List all feeds for the current (or named) channel.
USER.latest: !latest [#channel] <feed_name> - Show the latest entry from a feed.
USER.getfeed: !getfeed <title_or_domain> - Search for a feed and display the latest entry.
USER.genfeed: !genfeed <website_url> - Generate an RSS feed for a given site via rss.app.
USER.search: !search <query> - Search for feeds matching a query.
USER.unsub: !unsub <feed_name> - Unsubscribe from one of your private feeds.
USER.latestsub: !latestsub <feed_name> - Show the latest entry from one of your private subscriptions.
USER.mute: !mute <feed_name> [hours] - Mute a feed for yourself temporarily (specify hours) or permanently (omit hours).

OP.addfeed: !addfeed <feed_name> <URL> - Add an RSS feed to this channel.
OP.delfeed: !delfeed <feed_name> - Remove an RSS feed from this channel.
OP.getadd: !getadd <title_or_domain> - Search and auto-add a matching feed to this channel.
OP.setinterval: !setinterval <minutes> - Set the per-channel feed check interval (persisted).
OP.schedule: !schedule <feed_name> <minutes> - Set a custom check interval for one specific feed.

OWNER.join: !join <#channel> <adminname> - Make the bot join an IRC channel and assign its admin.
OWNER.part: !part <#channel> - Make the bot leave an IRC channel.
OWNER.network: !network <add|set|connect|del> ... - Manage secondary IRC networks. Subcommands: add <name> <server/port> [-ssl] <#channel> <opName>; set irc.<name>.<field> <value>; connect <name>; del <name>.
OWNER.webhook: !webhook <list|add|del|enable|disable|test> ... - Manage outbound webhooks. Subcommands: add <name> <url> [format]; del <name>; enable <name>; disable <name>; test <name>. Formats: discord, slack, ntfy, gotify, mattermost, json, text.
OWNER.reload: !reload - Reload feeds, channels, subscriptions, and admin mapping from disk.
